notes: The wiki pages Master_of_Coin.json and Small_Council.json are both redirect stubs with no article body — all substance comes from cross-references in character and house nodes.

Identity synthesized from 10 top-source node files covering Jaehaerys I, Petyr Baelish, Maegor I, Otto Hightower, Gyles Rosby, House Lannister, House Celtigar, Braavos, Oldtown, and the Arrest of Eddard Stark event.
18 HOLDS_TITLE reverse edges derived from infobox-data.jsonl; Rego Draz appears in prose sources but not in infobox-data, so noted as implied.
Alias 'Lord Treasurer' appears in multiple infobox Titles fields alongside 'Master of coin' (Gyles Rosby, Edwell Celtigar, Harys Swyft, Bartimos Celtigar entries).
Confidence docked from 1.0 because the wiki article itself is a redirect (no direct canonical description available); all prose is reconstructed from secondary references.
